summary: Video. A 'Beyond the Border: CBP Secures Super Bowl LX' segment shows CBP Super Bowl security operations through animated category cards (Perimeter Security, Import Screening, Merchandise Inspections) over B-roll of a helicopter cockpit, patrol boats, cargo screening, and a table of NFL trophies and counterfeit merchandise. It is a montage with graphic labels and no music, narration, or audio track.
notable_text: BEYOND the BORDER; CBP SECURES SUPER BOWL LX; PERIMETER SECURITY; IMPORT SCREENING; MERCHANDISE INSPECTIONS; U.S. Customs and Border Protection; NFL
